source: ACE 2005 event detection subset + synthetic event-annotated sentences (research open)

records.text: The company announced a merger with its rival.
Police arrested three suspects in downtown Chicago.
The bomb exploded near the central market killing twelve people.
The CEO resigned after the board voted to remove him.
Apple launched the new iPhone model in a live event.
The senator was elected by a landslide in the state election.
Thousands of civilians fled the conflict zone heading north.
The two nations signed a peace agreement ending decades of conflict.
A wildfire broke out in the hills east of Los Angeles.
The court sentenced the defendant to 20 years in prison.
Troops invaded the neighboring country at dawn.
The startup was acquired by Google for two billion dollars.
Protesters stormed the parliament building demanding the leader resign.
The charity donated food supplies to flood victims in Bangladesh.
Scientists discovered a new species of dinosaur in Argentina.
The prime minister appointed a new cabinet after elections.
The building collapsed after a 7.8 magnitude earthquake.
The company filed for bankruptcy protection on Monday.
The general surrendered to UN peacekeeping forces.
Aid workers distributed vaccines to children in the camp.
The witness testified before the congressional committee.
Millions of people voted in the historic presidential election.
The diplomat was expelled from the country after the espionage scandal.
The hospital received an emergency shipment of medical supplies.
The rebel group was defeated by government forces in the south.
The CEO was promoted to chairman of the board.
Negotiators reached a breakthrough agreement on climate change.
The jet crashed into the mountain shortly after takeoff.
Investors sold shares after the bank reported huge losses.
The new law was passed by parliament with a large majority.
